work_packages.label: Add system beginnings
work_packages.description: Removes all existing <sb/> elements first and then adds new ones every n measures, where n is determined by the sbInterval parameter.

sbInterval.description: Places an <sb/> element every n measures, where n is determined by this parameter.

work_packages.label: Add section and dirs with folio to ed from getElemFrom
work_packages.description: takes help_dom as context_dom and finds position of page beginnigs, adds them to ed_GLT or ed_CMN

work_packages.label: Prepare ed_GLT from Fronimo
work_packages.description: Add Header, Facs, Section, Finis, sbs. getElemfrom will be source for header, facs, sections, if no finis should be added, leave empty

work_packages.label: Add finis with finis text to last measure
work_packages.description: creates finistext in dir at last tstamp of last measure

work_packages.label: Add facsimile from getElemFrom
work_packages.description: takes help_dom as context_dom and finds position of page beginnigs, adds them to ed_GLT or ed_CMN

work_packages.label: Add Header from getElemFrom
work_packages.description: Adds header from dipl GLT with needed adjustments for all other filetypes

work_packages.label: Compare number of measures
work_packages.description: Compares number of measures in active and context files and prints number of measures of each file. Compares last measure number and accounts for pickup measures and invisible measures.
